projects.title: Doc-AI – Healthcare Diagnosis System
projects.subtitle: Unified Healthcare AI Platform
bullets: Problem: Manual doctor discovery and appointment booking is fragmented across multiple platforms, causing delays in patient care. Built a full-stack medical AI platform integrating 5 core modules – symptom triage, X-ray diagnosis, appointment booking, reports management, and FindCare provider search – into a single unified application, reducing patient navigation steps by ~60%.

Eliminated UI inconsistency across 8+ pages by engineering a reusable Tailwind CSS component library of 20+ components; enforced a mobile-first design system that achieved 100% responsive compatibility across all screen sizes and reduced per-page styling effort by ~40%.

Solved authentication fragmentation by designing 10+ Flask REST API endpoints with JWT-based stateless authentication, protected route middleware, and role-based access control – cutting unauthorised access surface area and enabling secure session handling without server-side state.

Decoupled frontend and backend by implementing React Router v6 for client-side routing across 8+ views and a centralised Axios API layer, reducing frontend-backend integration bugs by ~50% and enabling independent deployment of the React 18 frontend and Python/Flask backend.

projects.title: Automated Python Docstring Generator
projects.subtitle: AST-Based LLM Documentation Assistant
bullets: Developed an AI-powered tool that auto-generates structured docstrings for Python functions and classes, reducing documentation effort by 70% across 100+ lines of source code in real time.
Implemented AST-based static code analysis to extract function signatures, arguments, return types, and class metadata; integrated LLM APIs for Google and NumPy-style output with rate-limiting.

projects.title: AI Powered Personal Finance Management System
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Budgeting & Accounting System
bullets: Developed an 8-module finance application covering expense tracking, budgeting, reporting, user auth, and data backup managing 1,000+ transaction records; reduced manual tracking effort by 60%.
Designed a normalised SQLite schema with automated income/expense reporting and CSV export functionality.
